notes: Texas-first, nationwide eligible. Do not add Tavily here.
Paste Google Alerts RSS URLs into googleAlerts when you create alerts.
The runner also generates Google News RSS feeds from googleNewsQueries for free.

googleAlerts.name: PLACEHOLDER - paste a Google Alerts RSS URL here

googleNewsQueries.name: Texas physician practice owners
googleNewsQueries.query: ("physician founder" OR "practice owner" OR "medical practice owner" OR "surgeon founder") Texas

googleNewsQueries.name: Texas law firm partners
googleNewsQueries.query: ("named partner" OR "managing partner" OR "promoted to partner") "law firm" Texas

googleNewsQueries.name: Texas CPA tax advisors
googleNewsQueries.query: ("CPA" OR "tax advisor" OR "tax partner") ("oil and gas" OR "IDC deduction" OR "depletion allowance" OR "high net worth") Texas

googleNewsQueries.name: Texas business owner liquidity events
googleNewsQueries.query: ("acquired" OR "sold his company" OR "sold her company" OR "founder exits" OR "liquidity event") Texas founder owner CEO

googleNewsQueries.name: Energy-state oil and gas executives
googleNewsQueries.query: ("oil and gas" OR "mineral rights" OR "royalty owner" OR "energy operator") (Texas OR Oklahoma OR Louisiana OR New Mexico OR Colorado OR Wyoming OR North Dakota) founder CEO owner president

googleNewsQueries.name: Nationwide physician practice owners
googleNewsQueries.query: ("physician founder" OR "practice owner" OR "medical practice owner" OR "surgeon founder") "United States"

googleNewsQueries.name: Nationwide law firm partners
googleNewsQueries.query: ("managing partner" OR "named partner" OR "promoted to partner") "law firm" "United States"

googleNewsQueries.name: Nationwide CPA tax advisors
googleNewsQueries.query: ("CPA" OR "tax advisor" OR "tax partner") ("high net worth" OR "business owner" OR "oil and gas" OR "IDC deduction") "United States"

googleNewsQueries.name: Nationwide business founder exits
googleNewsQueries.query: ("acquired" OR "sold his company" OR "sold her company" OR "founder exits" OR "liquidity event") "United States" founder CEO owner

googleNewsQueries.name: Nationwide franchise and multi-unit owners
googleNewsQueries.query: ("multi-unit franchisee" OR "franchise owner" OR "multi unit operator") founder CEO owner "United States"

gdeltQueries.name: Energy executives
gdeltQueries.query: ("oil and gas" OR "mineral rights" OR "royalty owner") (Texas OR Oklahoma OR Louisiana OR New Mexico OR Colorado OR Wyoming OR North Dakota)

gdeltQueries.name: Nationwide founder liquidity events
gdeltQueries.query: ("acquired" OR "sold his company" OR "sold her company" OR "founder exits") "United States"
